Visiting Quay Academy Bridlington

Friday, 1 May, 2026
🏫 A big thank you to Principal Caroline Broadhead, Kimberley Lawton, Stacey Flynn, Victoria Craven and Katherine Robson for welcoming me and taking the time to show me around Quay Aacademy, Bridlington today. It was encouraging to learn more about the excellent work of the academy programme and the David Ross Education Trust in supporting primary schools, helping pupils thrive and raising...
